subject: Q1 Revenue Forecast Update
body:
Hi team,

I've updated the Q1 revenue forecast based on the latest pipeline data. We're tracking 12% above target, primarily driven by enterprise deal closures in EMEA. The SaaS recurring revenue stream is now at $4.2M MRR, up from $3.8M last quarter.

Key highlights:
- Enterprise segment grew 18% QoQ
- SMB churn reduced to 3.1% from 4.7%
- Average deal size increased to $45K from $38K

Please review the attached projections before our Thursday sync.

Best regards
